Argument Reference

  • log_group_id - (Required) Updating this value after creation is not supported.
  • display_name - (Required) (Updatable) A user-friendly display name for the log.
  • log_type - (Required) Updating this value after creation is not supported.
  • is_enabled - (Optional) (Updatable) Whether the log is enabled.
  • defined_tags - (Optional) (Updatable) Defined tags for the log.
  • freeform_tags - (Optional) (Updatable) Free-form tags for the log.
  • retention_duration - (Optional) (Updatable) Retention duration for the log in 30-day increments.
  • configuration - (Optional) Updating this value after creation is not supported.
